creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
sabnzbdplus was lacking a rc.d script. Created one that cleanly shuts down the daemon using the parameters from the config file.
Upgrades to 0.5.4 in the process.
Good exercise, works for me and hope it's OK for the community!

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Not a problem
